body:
Hey Amara,

Hope you had a good weekend — I wanted to follow up on our conversation from the [SyntheticEast Climate Summit](events/syntheticeast-climate-summit) last week and see if you'd be open to a quick call this month. We've been seeing a lot of deal flow at the intersection of grid optimization and foundation model inference, and given [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital)'s focus on that exact seam, I thought there might be real overlap worth exploring. A few of the founders we're talking to are actively looking for co-lead partners at seed, and I'd rather surface them to someone I trust than let them wander into a cold process. Let me know if a 30-minute sync sometime the week of the 22nd works for you — happy to send over a few slots.

Best,
Elena
